prestazioni: GME T6 2.0L Turbo (GSE) engine: BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbo upgrade (62mm compressor, 74mm turbine, 1.05 A/R) with custom 3.5" stainless downpipe and Vibrant 1799 resonated race muffler for optimized spool and 380whp/420wtq on E30 blend (91 octane + 30% ethanol) via HP Tuners custom flash with flex-fuel sensor integration

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 24-way rebound, 12-way compression) with custom valving for the Trailhawk's multi-link rear suspension, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers (hub-centric, 5x114.3 bolt pattern) to clear 285/70R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9 +18 offset)

Mopar Performance Stage 2 clutch kit (dual-disc, 6-piston caliper upgrade) with South Bend billet flywheel and Peloquin front differential locker (40% bias) for the Jeep Active Drive II 4x4 system, paired with a custom 4.56 gear set in the Dana 44 rear axle (32-spline, ARB Air Locker)
estetica: Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Type 2, carbon fiber fenders with integrated vents) modified for Trailhawk-specific bolt-on flares, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with satin black accents on the hood and roof

Seibon Carbon fiber hood (OEM-style, with functional heat extractor vents) and custom rear diffuser from 3D Carbon (modified to fit the Trailhawk's rear bumper cutouts) with integrated dual 4" exhaust outlets for the Vibrant setup

Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (amber fog, 5000K) mounted on a custom front bumper delete with a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch (synthetic rope, 12,000lb capacity) and a custom aluminum skid plate (3/8" thick, powder-coated textured black)
